name: shofer-router
description: VSCode extension providing direct access to multiple LLM providers with composite model failover — no external router service required

apiKey.description: API key for provider authentication (stored securely via SecretStorage)

shofer.router.defaultModel.description: Default model to use for completions

shofer.router.timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds (default 5 min for long LLM responses)

shofer.router.compositeModelsFile.description: Path to a composite-models.json file defining arkware/* composite models

shofer.router.experimental.prometheusEnd.description: Enable Prometheus /metrics HTTP endpoint on 127.0.0.1:30098 (port overridable via SHOFER_ROUTER_METRICS_PORT env var)

shofer.router.compositeModelsConfig.description: Inline JSON configuration for composite models (arkware/*). Alternative to compositeModelsFile — paste your composite-models.json content here directly. compositeModelsFile takes precedence if both are set.

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Configure
commands.description: Configure the Shofer LLM Router settings

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Refresh Models
commands.description: Refresh the list of available models

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Show Metrics
commands.description: Show per-model cost, latency, and reliability metrics

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Show Model Stats
commands.description: Show detailed statistics for a specific model

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Export Metrics (Prometheus)
commands.description: Export current metrics in Prometheus text format

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Show Composite Distribution
commands.description: Show load-balancing distribution for a composite model

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Show Cost History
commands.description: Show cost breakdown by model across a selected time range
